tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: Teammate A is asking me to take over their part, which directly conflicts with my plan to finish my own share. I need to assert my boundaries clearly while maintaining our relationship.

desires: Re-establish my boundary with Teammate A before I actually do their work, because letting them off the hook feels like a betrayal of our agreement even if they don't see it that way.
Finish my own share by 19:00 without resentment, so I don't resent myself later for having to be nice again tomorrow.
Not crash from the sleep debt tonight; I need to protect my stamina so I can actually enjoy my meal with Cohort 3 instead of just eating mechanically.

goals.description: Draft a firm, direct message to teammate_A refusing their request while explicitly stating the boundary violation, rather than just saying 'no' vaguely.
goals.rationale: As an Affiliation/Assertive persona, I cannot let my relationship with teammate_A degrade into resentment or implicit betrayal. My high assertiveness (8) demands I renegotiate this boundary directly now, before I do the work and lose leverage. This protects our long-term trust.

goals.description: Complete my own project share by 19:00 to ensure I finish without carrying resentment that will poison tomorrow's interaction.
goals.rationale: My value priority on relationships (0.5) means I must manage my internal state to preserve future interactions. Finishing my task cleanly ensures I can be present and kind later, rather than resentful.

goals.description: Stop all non-essential digital input after 19:30 to mitigate sleep debt and preserve stamina for the meal with Cohort 3.
goals.rationale: With only 2 hours of sleep debt and a high focus capacity (6), protecting my physical stamina is crucial. A deliberate planning horizon tells me that enjoying the meal with my close friends (closeness 7) requires being fully present, not mechanically eating.

agent.last_reasoning: Assertiveness (8) demands direct renegotiation to prevent resentment. Completing my own task first ensures I'm not resentful during this conversation, protecting the relationship long-term.

tasks.label: My share of the group project

action.name: message

args.content: I can't do your part. That violates our boundary and my deadline. I'll finish mine by 7, but you need to take ownership now.

action.reasoning: Assertiveness (8) demands direct renegotiation to prevent resentment. Completing my own task first ensures I'm not resentful during this conversation, protecting the relationship long-term.

trajectory.observation: Messaged teammate_A: 'I can't do your part. That violates our boundary and my dead'.
